generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance JointCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects real-time input current measurements from the MABI MAX 100 robot's joint actuators for digital shadowing purposes."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance JointAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures output angle of the MABI MAX 100 robot's joints with high precision for motion control analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance JointTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Senses torque values at each joint of the MABI MAX 100 robot to enable friction identification and load monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance JointAngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks angular velocity of the MABI MAX 100 robot's joints for dynamic system behavior analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance JointCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Automated one-way transmission of input current measurements from JointCurrentSensor via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointCurrentSensor
]

instance JointAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Automated one-way transmission of joint angle measurements from JointAngleSensor via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointAngleSensor
]

instance JointTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Automated one-way transmission of torque measurements from JointTorqueSensor via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointTorqueSensor
]

instance JointAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Automated one-way transmission of angular velocity measurements from JointAngularVelocitySensor via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointAngularVelocitySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML-based structural model representing the MABI MAX 100 robot's components, interfaces, and interconnections using Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML state machine model (v1.7) or MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling of the MABI MAX 100 robot's dynamic system behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MathWorksSimulinkDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed behavioral simulation model in MathWorks Simulink for dynamic system modeling of the MABI MAX 100 robot's motion control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance JointCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured aggregation of raw input current measurements from JointCurrentDataTransmitted for joint friction identification analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregationEnabler
]

instance JointAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured aggregation of raw joint angle measurements from JointAngleDataTransmitted for motion trajectory analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregationEnabler
]

instance JointTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured aggregation of raw torque measurements from JointTorqueDataTransmitted for load monitoring and friction detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregationEnabler
]

instance JointAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured aggregation of raw angular velocity measurements from JointAngularVelocityDataTransmitted for dynamic system behavior analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML (Systems Modeling Language) framework for structural and behavioral modeling of the MABI MAX 100 robot's architecture, including components, interfaces, and interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService, IntegratedVisualizationService
]

instance MathWorksSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for detailed behavioral simulation and dynamic system modeling of the MABI MAX 100 robot's motion control."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance MQTTCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport) protocol for lightweight, publish-subscribe-based one-way data transmission from physical robot to Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance DataAggregationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated data aggregation and abstraction framework for preprocessing (normalization, filtering) of raw sensor data into structured traces."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance MBSEFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) framework for integrating heterogeneous models (SysML + Simulink) across requirements, functional, logical, and technical layers."
    DTDFVocab:enables IntegratedVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated collection, preprocessing (normalization/filtering), and structured aggregation of contextual data traces from physical robot sensors."

]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction patterns in the MABI MAX 100 robot through analysis of aggregated torque and angular velocity data traces."
]

instance MotionTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of motion trajectories and operational logs to identify performance characteristics and potential anomalies in the robot's movement."
]

instance SystemStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of the MABI MAX 100 robot's aggregated data traces (joint states, operational parameters) for manufacturing engineers and operators."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin (DT) constellation** is implicitly described through the **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) framework**, which employs **architecture description languages (ADLs)** like ACME, AADL, or MontiArc to define **component integration, orchestration, and coordination**. These ADLs enable **system-wide coordination** via **component connectors** and **composition rules**, ensuring interoperability between heterogeneous models (e.g., SysML for architecture, Simulink for behavior, or C++/Java for implementation). The document does not specify exact **orchestration patterns** (e.g., microservices, event-driven) or **resource management** mechanisms, but it highlights the need to integrate **multiple modeling notations and tools** (e.g., simulation tools, general-purpose languages) under a unified MBSE approach. The **Digital Shadow Reference Model** (Fig. 1) further emphasizes **data aggregation and abstraction** as a foundational layer for DT coordination."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The document does not explicitly address **horizontal integration** with external systems, data exchange protocols, or interoperability standards. However, it implies **dependencies on external systems** through the use of **MBSE methodologies** (e.g., RFLP, OOSEM, SPES) and **heterogeneous toolchains** (e.g., SysML, Simulink, C++/Java), which require **interoperability** between modeling languages and simulation tools. The **Digital Shadow Reference Model** suggests **one-way data flows** (e.g., from physical objects to digital shadows), but does not detail **bidirectional integration patterns** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT, REST APIs) or **enterprise system dependencies** (e.g., ERP, MES). Thus, the document lacks concrete specifications for **external system integration**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) standards**, specifically leveraging **SysML** for modeling and **Architecture Description Languages (ADLs)** such as **ACME**, **AADL**, and **MontiArc** for component-based system design. Additionally, the system implements **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)** as a key interoperability standard, enabling standardized data exchange and integration. Sensor data is streamed via **MQTT**, a lightweight publish-subscribe protocol, ensuring real-time data acquisition and communication. While no explicit certification frameworks are mentioned, compliance with **industry-specific MBSE standards** and **AAS specifications** is implied for interoperability and governance."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The provided documents reference **safety-critical considerations** only in the context of the **MABI robotic arm (Max 100-2-25-P)** [44], which operates within a **physical safety cell** to ensure operator protection during motion control tasks. No explicit cybersecurity protocols (e.g., OAuth 2.0, TLS/SSL, IEC 62443), access control mechanisms, or threat mitigation strategies are detailed in the documents. The **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** [46, 47, 50] is mentioned as a framework for asset lifecycle management but lacks specific security governance or privacy compliance (e.g., GDPR) in the provided excerpts. The **RAMI4.0 reference architecture** [48, 49] is cited for industrial interoperability but does not elaborate on data ownership policies or consent management in the given context."
]
